I’m pleased to announce a new tranche of Emergent Ventures, focused specifically on progress-oriented projects in the United Kingdom. This initiative is made possible in partnership with [Founders Pledge](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5b9d5b73ae33f1493c1259c3541684e480cf0fa82bca8fafa04dafa5e6c20b4a&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90887&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=18cba6bfd85f64424def77af6a641bc7&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d48702060c09ecb4d15214ad2081666b) and [Renaissance Philanthropy](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=0afe903621b7e63f557db904104c6f19bee661edebf1fea3911c3835d72ae1f4&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90887&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=2eaad0bac451614c06b285698e45eed6&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d48702060c09ecb4d15214ad2081666b).
While EV has regarded the UK as a priority area from the beginning, this tranche enables increased support for pro-science, pro-progress projects at a critical time. Those interested can [apply](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5045b55c1ed76fb3a02544e701c1ff46ab9962dffcb97a9682eb1a6e13c06436&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90887&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=06309836df1fa5736cb504fcd8695933&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d48702060c09ecb4d15214ad2081666b) through the standard Emergent Ventures application process, selecting "United Kingdom" in the dropdown for "My project will affect."
